home_description_text: Kube Mastery is a learning platform that simulates a complete Kubernetes cluster directly in your browser. You can practice kubectl commands, create and manage pods, deployments, services, and more.
footer_languageChange_message: Please navigate to another page to see the changes take effect.
termsOfService_intro: Welcome to KubeMastery. By accessing or using our platform, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. Please read them carefully.
termsOfService_acceptance_content: By accessing and using KubeMastery, you accept and agree to be bound by the terms and provision of this agreement. If you do not agree to these terms, please do not use our service.
termsOfService_description_content: KubeMastery is an online learning platform that provides Kubernetes training through a browser-based cluster simulator. We offer courses, tutorials, and hands-on practice environments.
termsOfService_account_content: To access certain features, you may need to create an account. You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account credentials and for all activities that occur under your account.
termsOfService_use_content: You agree not to use the service to: (a) violate any laws or regulations; (b) infringe upon the rights of others; (c) transmit any harmful or malicious code; (d) attempt to gain unauthorized access to our systems; (e) interfere with or disrupt the service.
termsOfService_intellectual_content: All content on KubeMastery, including but not limited to text, graphics, logos, and software, is the property of KubeMastery or its content suppliers and is protected by copyright and other intellectual property laws.
termsOfService_limitation_content: KubeMastery is provided 'as is' without warranties of any kind. We shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, or consequential damages arising from your use of the service.
termsOfService_changes_content: We reserve the right to modify these terms at any time. We will notify users of any material changes by updating the 'Last updated' date. Your continued use of the service constitutes acceptance of the modified terms.
termsOfService_contact_content: If you have any questions about these Terms of Service, please contact us through our contact page.
contact_placeholder: Contact information will be added here.
privacyPolicy_intro: At KubeMastery, we are committed to protecting your privacy. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, and safeguard your personal information.
privacyPolicy_collection_content: We collect information that you provide directly to us, such as when you create an account, including your email address and password. We also collect usage data, such as which courses you access and your progress.
privacyPolicy_use_content: We use the information we collect to: provide and improve our services, personalize your learning experience, track your progress, communicate with you about your account, and send you important updates about our service.
privacyPolicy_security_content: We implement appropriate technical and organizational measures to protect your personal information. Your data is stored securely and we use encryption to protect sensitive information.
privacyPolicy_storage_content: We use browser local storage to store your authentication session and theme preferences. This data is stored locally on your device and is not shared with third parties. You can clear this data at any time through your browser settings.
privacyPolicy_sharing_content: We do not sell your personal information. We may share your information only in the following circumstances: with your consent, to comply with legal obligations, or to protect our rights and safety.
privacyPolicy_rights_content: You have the right to access, update, or delete your personal information. You can manage your account settings or contact us to exercise these rights. You may also request a copy of your data.
privacyPolicy_retention_content: We retain your personal information for as long as your account is active or as needed to provide you services. We may retain certain information as required by law or for legitimate business purposes.
privacyPolicy_changes_content: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. We will notify you of any material changes by updating the 'Last updated' date. Your continued use of the service constitutes acceptance of the updated policy.
privacyPolicy_contact_content: If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy or our data practices, please contact us through our contact page.
pricing_features_speed_desc: Load the page and you're good to go - no waiting, no setup
pricing_features_stability_desc: Everything runs locally - stay in the flow, no interruptions
pricing_features_price_desc: No cloud costs to cover - learn without breaking the bank
pricing_trainer_subtitle: For bootcamps, schools, and training centers
pricing_trainer_feature1: Create and share your own courses
pricing_faq_a1: A Kubernetes cluster simulator runs entirely in your browser. You practice kubectl commands and manage resources in real time—no real cluster or cloud. Because everything is local, loading is instant and there’s no network latency or server wait.
pricing_faq_q2: Does it resemble a real cluster?
pricing_faq_a2: Yes. We test against the OpenAPI spec and build our courses from the official Kubernetes docs, so behavior matches real clusters as closely as possible.
pricing_faq_q3: Do I need a credit card?
pricing_faq_a3: No. You can start the free course immediately. A credit card will only be needed when full access (one-time payment) is available.
pricing_faq_a4: No. The platform is proprietary software.
courses_subtitle: Learn Kubernetes step by step with structured paths
courses_intro_description: Get started with Kubernetes fundamentals. Learn the basics of pods, deployments, and services in a safe environment.
courses_intermediate_description: Deep dive into advanced Kubernetes concepts including ConfigMaps, Secrets, and resource management.
courseEditor_visibleToAll: This course is visible to all users
courseEditor_visibleOnlyToYou: This course is only visible to you
courseEditor_unpublishConfirm: Are you sure you want to unpublish this course? It will no longer be visible to users.
courseEditor_publishConfirm: Are you sure you want to publish this course? It will become visible to all users.
courseOverview_chapterFree: This chapter is free and accessible without registration
admin_noCoursesYet: No courses yet. Create your first course!
admin_deleteCourseConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this course?
app_errorLoadingCluster: Failed to load your sandbox. Please try again.
home_stats_subtitle: Kubernetes is here to stay: massive adoption, a booming market, and trusted by thousands of companies
home_stats_adoption_description: 66% of organizations use Kubernetes in production, with another 18% evaluating it
home_stats_market_description: From $2.61 billion in 2025 to $14.6 billion by 2033, growing at 24% annually
home_stats_companies_description: Trusted by over 50,000 companies worldwide to power their production workloads
home_features_title: The simplest way to learn Kubernetes
home_features_subtitle: Tired of waiting for your cluster to start or losing your progress? Try a different approach.
home_concerns_subtitle: A Kubernetes learning platform with a cluster simulation that runs right in your browser. We strive to match real cluster behavior, here's how:
home_concerns_openapi_description: We test against the official Kubernetes OpenAPI specs. All resources (Pods, Deployments, ConfigMaps, Secrets...) are validated for maximum compliance.
home_concerns_doc_description: Our courses follow the official Kubernetes docs. The simulation faithfully reproduces real cluster behavior.
home_concerns_code_description: We use the Kubernetes source code as reference. Learning here can even be more efficient than a real cluster — no time lost on infrastructure issues unrelated to what you're learning.
home_concerns_comparison_description: We compare our outputs with real clusters. kubectl commands produce identical results to a real environment.
home_subtitle_variant_a: Don't let progress bars kill your flow. Access high-fidelity Kubernetes labs instantly, right in your browser.
modules_subtitle: Learn at your own pace by choosing the topics that interest you
